creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Jun 6, 2013, at 19:38, Mark Felder wrote:
> Minor patch revision. I have been speaking with upstream and a fix is in
> the works for the next update. Meanwhile I feel it's best to 100% mimic
> what Debian is doing to work around this issue which can be viewed here:
> 

http://patch-tracker.debian.org/patch/series/view/musicbrainzngs/0.4-1/remove_unused_data

somehow un-pasted that Debian link before hitting 'Send'
